race.description: Wilson Project Group Country Boosted Maiden Handicap
race.comment: OUBAITORI (10) loomed into the race nicely when resuming at Wagga but flattened out quickly. Better for that and keeps the hot hand Boudvillain. Leading player. OKAY ZOOMER (9) resumed from a spell last start and was beaten 2.75 lengths when sixth over 1175m at Albury. Can come on from that run and looks a serious contender. FAIR MASTER (1) backs up quickly after racing on the speed and finishing third over 1400m at Wagga. Nicely drawn and should be in the finish. TWICE AS QUICK (11) was prominent until they straightened last time but weakened to finish fifth at Albury. Among the better chances.
